AS TO THE REMAINING REQUESTS, THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS ON OR BEFORE 10/18/04. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE BLANKET OBJECTIONS WERE MADE WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $736.30, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 10/18/04. (610/BCHAN)
